message:
style(ft-kernel-cpu): normalize assert match formatting in reduce_sum_for_broadcast tests

The three reduce_sum_for_broadcast rejection tests (rank mismatch,
invalid broadcast contract, gradient length mismatch) used multi-line
`assert!(matches!(...))` blocks that were inconsistent with the
project-wide single-line style. Collapse each to a single-line form
to match the surrounding test patterns and improve readability.

No behavioral changes; this is purely a formatting pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
